Class TermBuffer<Goal extends ProofGoal<Goal>>

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.prover.strategy.costbased.termProjection.TermBuffer<Goal>
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProjectionToTerm<Goal>
Direct Known Subclasses:
TermBuffer
public class TermBuffer<Goal extends ProofGoal<Goal>> extends Object implements ProjectionToTerm<Goal>
Projection that can store and returns an arbitrary term or formula. Objects of this class are mainly used like bound variables and together with features like LetFeature and ForEachCP.
